Class TreatmentLevels.Pediatric

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.enums.TreatmentLevels.Pediatric
Enclosing class:
TreatmentLevels
public static class TreatmentLevels.Pediatric extends Object
Pediatric treatment levels with specific order of severity.
